category_sources: source_facts.description says RAD tool for GTK+ and GNOME; official Glade homepage describes quick development of GTK and GNOME user interfaces.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is glade; official homepage title is Glade - A User Interface Designer.
docs_sources: Official Glade homepage has a Documentation section; official GNOME Help hosts the Glade Interface Designer Manual.
repo_sources: Official Glade homepage links to Browse Sources on GitLab; GNOME wiki/archive gives git clone https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/glade.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a GTK/GNOME RAD tool; official homepage describes GTK user interface design and GtkBuilder XML output.
